_credit.license: PixelLab Terms of Service — output may be used commercially in user projects. May NOT be used to train models.
_credit.prompt: small realistic side-view white rabbit with grey ears, NOT chibi, NOT fluffy, compact crouched body, two long upright ears, small head proportional to body, tiny round tail, small black dot eyes, single black outline, simple flat colors, 3-color palette only, minimalist farm animal sprite, Stardew Valley style, Vadimsadovski Adobe Stock pixel animal collection style, classic 16-bit RPG NPC, sitting calmly facing right

_notes.paletteScheme: Quantised to PetPalettes index 6 (Slate Gray). Slots: 1=outline 2=primary 3=secondary 4=highlight 5=accent 6=pattern. Swap the palette block at render time to recolour.
_notes.mirrored: All frames mirrored horizontally during import (East-facing baseline; PixelLab west.png faces left).
_notes.groundOffsetsY: Per-stage feet-row index from the top of the 48-row canvas — used by PetStage to bottom-anchor sprites so all displayScales sit on the ground line correctly.
